legend.name: Legend
legend.description: Renown and mythic weight that unlocks divine capabilities at higher tiers.
legend.mechanicalEffects: Tier sets baseline target numbers and capability ceilings (see Tiers, Origin p. 63). At Origin, follow mortal/pre-Visitation guidance in Character Creation (Knacks, Health, Defense notes on pp. 98–99).
legend.source: Scion_Origin_(Revised_Download).pdf, Tiers p. 63; Legend discussion Hero+

deeds.name: Deeds
deeds.description: Short-term, long-term, and band goals that propel the story.
deeds.mechanicalEffects: Origin chargen expects three Deeds (concept step, p. 94).
